case_title: BOJANOWER, PAUL A. VS FELDMAN, MARC C.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR BOJANOWER, PAUL A. ASSIGNED TO COACHELLA VALLEY COLLECTION SERVICES
ASSIGNEE OF RECORD'S REQUEST FOR INFORMATION OF THE CASE - SENT.
COACHELLA VALLEY COLLECTION SERVICE AS ASSIGNEE ON RECORDS FILING FOR MOTION.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BOJANOWER, PAUL A. AS TO DEFENDANT FELDMAN, MARC C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RE VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY DEFENDANT FELDMAN.
COURT'S VENUE CHALLENGE RESPONSE SENT TO MARC C. FELDMAN-RETURNED TO SENDER.
ORDER OF NOTICE OF MOTION FOR TRIAL MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FELDMAN, MARC C. HEARING SET FOR APR-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ENDORSED COPY SENT TO ASSIGNEE-COACHELLA VALLEY COLLECTION SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-09-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-07-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT CHALLENGES VENUE. VENUE IS PROPER. CASE CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.
ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT RETURNED TO COACHELLLA COLLECTION AGENCY; ALREADY ASSIGNED 6/4/06.
THIS FILE IS BEING HELD BY COM. SLAVIT PENDING THE FUTURE DATE HEARING ON THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT SET FOR 4/16/07 1:30
MOTION TO ASSIGN DEFT'S RIGHT TO PAYMENT FROM 3RD PARTY CREDITOR MEDIAVAST INC. GRANTED. ORDER ASSIGNING RIGHT TO PAYMENT STAYED TO AND INCLUDING
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ORDER ASSIGNING RIGHTS TO PAYMENT AND ASSIGNMENT ORDER TO MEDIAVAST, INC. (3RD PARTY CREDITOR).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOJANOWER, PAUL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FELDMAN, MARC C. $4,332.00 PRINCIPAL, $332.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,664.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. EXCESSIVE COSTS FOR SERVICE PLUS FILING FEE IS APPROVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED. DEFT SHALL CONTACT CLERK TO ARRANGE FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE. PARTIES NOTIFIED IMMEDIATELY.
PERSON SERVED, MARGARET WILSON, PROCESS SPECIALIST FOR CT CORP. AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FELDMAN, MARC C.
LETTER RE VENUE CHALLENGE SENT BY COURT-NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION COURT ON MOTION FOR TRIAL OF MAR-13-2007, GRANTED
COURT ORDER DENYING DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT BY REGULAR AND BY FEDEX OVERNIGHT SATURDAY DELIVERY.
COPIES OF ORDER RE MOVAC OFF CALENDAR SENT TO BOTH PARTIES AND ASSIGNEE OF RECORD.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT WAS FILED BY THE ASSIGNEE OF RECORD. AS TO DEFENDANT FELDMAN, MARC C.
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER & ANSWER BY ASSIGNEE OF RECORD COACHELLA VALLEY COLLECTION SERVC FILED. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES (SUSPENCE DATE 2/6/07)
MOTION COURT ON MOTION FOR TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOJANOWER, PAUL A. HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED. $10 FEE PAID. LATE FILING. SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR APPROVAL.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-16-2007, OFF CALENDAR
ASSIGNEE'S ASSIGNMENT ORDER SUBMITTED TO COURT: "THE STAY OF THIS ORDER EXPIRED BY ITS TERMS ON APRIL 16, 2007, AND IS HEREBY VACATED," PER COURT.
